note: Mathlib/SetTheory/ZFC/Basic.lean:44 def ZFSet : Type (u+1) := Quotient PSet.setoid; module docstring literally states '# A model of ZFC', modeling Zermelo-Fraenkel (+choice) set theory inside Lean's type theory (extensionality, empty set, pairing, union, power set, infinity, foundation, replacement/separation, choice all proved as ZFSet theorems).
Mathlib/Order/Monotone/Defs.lean:62 def Monotone (f : α → β) : Prop := ∀ ⦃a b⦄, a ≤ b → f a ≤ f b -- the standard order-theoretic definition of a monotonic (order-preserving) function.
